ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2013 Off Calendar

Request For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-17-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Robert Cohen, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff, STATE FRAM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE CO.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) VICTOR PEREZ, aka VICTOR EMILIO PEREZ, aka VICTOR E. ESTEVEZ, aka VICTOR E. PEREZ individually and dba TWIN BROTHERS AUTO GLASS; STEREO PLACE, INC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Adrena Barkley and Monica Ha sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $26,803.26
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 10%: $2,955.70
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $588.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $30,346.96
Judgment signed in open court.
